name: towles-tool
description: Chris Towles's personal Claude Code plugins: the map-vs-territory workflow commands, and a bridge to the towles-tool desktop app (MCP server + gh refresh hook).

plugins.name: tt
plugins.description: Commands for discovering your unknowns across the map-vs-territory workflow (trq212, 'The map is not the territory'). Before: /blindspot, /brainstorm, /interview, /references; plan/during: /plan; after: /pitch, /comprehend, /memories, /handoff.

plugins.name: towles-tool-app
plugins.description: Bridges Claude Code to the towles-tool desktop app — its MCP server (board tasks: task_list, task_status, task_create, task_delete) plus a hook that nudges the app to refresh PR/issue data immediately after a gh pr/gh issue mutation. Plus the towles-tool CLI reference skill and the task-onboarding skill.
